retirementPhaseRules.observe: Use only while hot path isolation or governance prerequisites are incomplete.
retirementPhaseRules.restrict: Default stage once bridge is explicit-only and auditable.
retirementPhaseRules.retire_ready: Allowed only when runtime mode is disabled and a release window passed without dependency.

retirementGates.label: Hot path isolated
retirementGates.rationale: Legacy compatibility must stay outside read/write/sync hot paths.

retirementGates.label: Explicit usage observed and auditable
retirementGates.rationale: Any remaining bridge usage must be measurable before restricting or retiring it.

retirementGates.label: Migration rules governed
retirementGates.rationale: Legacy imports must keep using the governed migration pipeline and schema checks.

retirementGates.label: Release window without bridge dependency
retirementGates.rationale: The bridge can retire only after at least one release window with no required usage.
